decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 9/10 sessions consistent. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 touched preferences but did not restructure for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 33/3002 lines reworked (1.1%, 36/50). 0/31 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 1.1% (14/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 35. Session 8: 29 (process:20 efficiency:7 ttfw:2). Session 9: 45 (process:20 efficiency:19 ttfw:6). Session 10: 38 (process:20 efficiency:16 ttfw:2). Session 11: 31 (process:20 efficiency:9 ttfw:2). Session 12: 31 (process:20 efficiency:10 ttfw:1).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 223/223 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
